steps.title: Screen 1 — short headline (front of card)
steps.body:
Longer text on the back after you flip. Use **double asterisks** for bold.

New paragraph.
steps.tip: Optional yellow tip box on the back.

steps.title: Screen 2 — next step
steps.body: Tell them exactly what to tap. Mention **{{email}}** if you added it to their leader record in documents.json.
